allow: Bash(git commit -m 'ci: add Ruby 4.0.5 to CI matrix *)
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: bump to Ruby 4.0.5 and update dependencies *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: add Git workflow rules \(no force push, rebase before push\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'ci: drop EOL Ruby 3.2 from matrix and bump minimum to 3.3 *)
